scripts.pull: node test/e2e/publish.js prod && cd src && clasp pull
scripts.publish:test: npm run build:forms && npm test && node test/e2e/publish.js test && npm run push && node test/e2e/publish.js clear
scripts.publish:prod: npm run build:forms && npm test && node test/e2e/publish.js prod && npm run push && node test/e2e/publish.js clear
